data.title: Binance CEO: Binance holds nearly 59% of the stablecoin reserves of centralized exchanges
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Richard Teng, CEO of Binance, posted on the X platform that the latest data from CryptoQuant revealed that Binance holds nearly 59% of the stablecoin reserves of centralized exchanges, worth approximately US$31 billion.

data.title: KOL scooter mocks James Wynn for "begging for revenge trading funds"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The crypto KOL scooter (@imperooterxbt), who was involved in exposing the inside story of LIBRA tokens, posted a post mocking that James Wynn could have cashed out $100 million, but now he is "begging for $20" on the social platform for revenge transactions, and bluntly stated that "the crypto industry is full of irrational gamblers."

data.title: Binance Wallet Launches $1M Solana Restaking Event Featuring Fragmetric & Solayer Rewards
data.description: Binance Wallet kicks off its Solana Pledge Income Season, offering users the chance to share in a $1 million prize pool by restaking SOL or BNSOL on the Solana blockchain through Fragmetric or Solayer strategies. The campaign runs from June 5 to August 23, 2025 (UTC) and is exclusively available via Binance Wallet Earn.Highlights:Total Rewards: $1,000,000 in SOL, LAYER, and Fragmetric Future TokensEvent Period: June 5, 2025 – August 23, 2025 (UTC)Platform: Binance MPC Wallet on Solana ChainEligibility: Minimum deposit of 0.2 SOL or 0.2 BNSOLStep 1: Deposit & Earn from $100,000 SOL PoolDeposit at least 0.2 SOL or 0.2 BNSOL to the Solana Chain via Binance MPC Wallet and opt-in on the event page to share a $100,000 SOL reward pool. You must opt-in via the event page. Wallet must be backed-up.Step 2: Restake & Share Up to $900,000Promotion A (June 5 – July 4, 2025):Restake SOL or BNSOL into FragmetricEarn from a $300,000 pool of Fragmetric Future TokensPromotion B (June 25 – August 23, 2025):Stake into Solayer strategiesShare $600,000 in LAYER tokensNotes & Terms:Only backed-up Binance MPC wallets qualify for rewards.Rewards will be distributed within 6 weeks post-event.Token values will be calculated using real-time exchange rates.Unstaking/redemptions may take up to 6 days.

data.title: Coinbase launches its wrapped XRP and Dogecoin on Base
data.description:
Coinbase has added two new wrapped tokens to its Base network, expanding its lineup of ERC-20 assets with cbDOGE and cbXRP, the exchange announced via its official X account on June 5. The tokens are backed 1:1 by Dogecoin (DOGE) and XRP, respectively, and are held in custody by Coinbase. In its announcement post, the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinbase-launches-wrapped-xrp-doge-on-base/

data.title: The loss-making whale who repeatedly longed ETH added another 1,341 ETH, buying a total of 5,002 ETH in 5 days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the whale address that lost money due to long 8613 ETH two hours ago has added 1341 ETH again, worth about 3.52 million US dollars.
This address has bought 5002 ETH on the chain in the past 5 days, with a total value of about 13.05 million US dollars, and the average purchase price is 2580 US dollars. At present, all ETH has been deposited in Aave as margin, and some USDT has been borrowed.

data.title: Viewpoint: Traditional capital markets are eager for more native Web3 companies, and Backpack has become the next potential target
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Circle is about to land on Nasdaq. As a Web3 native company with USDC issuer as its core, it has become another milestone in successfully entering the mainstream capital market in the United States after a few companies such as Coinbase. Industry insiders pointed out that the traditional capital market has a huge demand for exposure to the cryptocurrency field, but Web3 native companies that meet compliance requirements, can be effectively valued, and are publicly traded are still scarce.
In this context, Backpack is regarded as the next strong candidate for a structure close to the acceptance of the US capital market. Backpack's appeal lies not only in its innovative product matrix, but also in its complete layout in compliance awareness, entity registration, and product stratification.
Market opinion believes that Backpack has shown great potential to become a "retail financial platform" in the Web3 era. Its rapid momentum in user growth and its structural status close to the understandable traditional financial market make it a compelling potential target when Wall Street seeks measurable and valueable crypto companies.

data.title: USDD 2.0 total supply officially exceeds 400 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to USDD official news, the total supply of USDD2.0 has now exceeded the 400 million mark, reaching 421.38 million, and its total locked value (TVL) has also climbed to US$457.23 million. This breakthrough demonstrates the continued growth and wide recognition of USDD as a decentralized stablecoin in the global market.
USDD is the world's first community-driven, over-collateralized decentralized stablecoin. With its strong security, auditability and cross-chain adaptability, it continues to play a role in diversified asset allocation and stable income scenarios. The significant increase in supply this time not only verifies the real market demand for decentralized stablecoins, but also highlights the key position and active performance of USDD in the decentralized financial ecosystem.

data.title: California moves forward bill on unclaimed crypto, merchant payments
data.description:
The bill has seen contention online, but Satoshi Action Fund’s Eric Peterson says it updates the state’s unclaimed property laws so crypto doesn’t get liquidated.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/california-moves-forward-bill-unclaimed-crypto-merchant-payments?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitget CEO: Institutional clients drive 80% of its spot trading volume, on par with Coinbase
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget CEO Gracy Chen tweeted, "Since January, Bitget has enhanced its institutional services, such as upgrading our loan program, increasing liquidity incentives, and planning to launch a unified margin account in the third quarter to improve the efficiency of fund use. Currently, 80% of the top crypto quantitative companies are now trading on Bitget; institutional clients drive 80% of our spot trading volume, on par with Coinbase; within 6 months, its futures trading volume share doubled to 50%, with the goal of reaching more than 70% by the end of the year; institutional asset management scale (AUM) has also doubled."
